description: From the manufacturer WHY YOU'LL LOVE ME The ultimate paddle brush for wet or dry hair. Great for detangling, soothing and creating a sleek, shiny blow-dry for all hair types and lengths, including extensions. Previous page Next page 1 FLEXIBLE BRISTLES 2 CUSHIONED BODY HOW TO USE To detangle on wet or dry hair: Start by brushing out the ends and work your way up to the crown. For extensions, hold the hair below the top of the extension and brush away tangles. This helps to avoid unnecessary tugging. To create a sleek blow-dry: Rough-dry hair. Work in clean sections and place the paddle brush underneath the sections at the roots and pull through towards ends while directing the airflow of the dryer downward. Dry thoroughly from roots to ends. Complete Your Collection Prep Rally Full Pint Detox Lush Prime & Prep Detangler Protects hair from heat and preps for styling products. Medium Round Ceramic Brush Vented ceramic barrel allows for maximum heat and airflow. Dry Shampoo Eliminates oils and impurities, leaving hair looking clean and refreshed. Noir Scent Notes of ginger, mint and sandalwood. Long-Lasting Styles Locks in volume and curl. Lush Scent Notes of violet, sandalwood and musk.

product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Flexible nylon bristles work through tangles without pulling or tugging. Broad, flat base covers a wider surface area of hair. Cushioned body allows for gentle styling with sleek, shiny results. Soft-touch finish is comfortable and slip-free.
